name: On Tour

abilities.name: Thunderous Performance
abilities.text: While performing an opposed duel with an enemy that has a Craven token, this model receives +1 to its duel total.

abilities.name: Consumed by Sin
abilities.text: When this model receives a raise in an opposed duel with an enemy model, the enemy model gains a Sin token.

actions.name: Destructive Performance
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target two other friendly Crossroads models within range, ignoring LoS.
actions.effects: Remove all enemy Scheme markers in the area between this model and the two targets. All enemies in the area between this model and the two targets must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain this model's choice of a Craven or Sin token and be dealt 2 damage.

extraction_notes: Destructive Performance has three skulls indicating it is a signature action
